objective: Materialize cited public posts and conversations without treating engagement as factual authority.
rules: Use the exact Core-verified collection_id as topic_id and list current posts and conversations before writing.
For each relevant public post, call social.post-upsert with its at:// URI and exact pinned Source id, revision, hash and fetched time.
Count only post rows confirmed by successful social.post-upsert or social.post-list results; never infer an additional post from search totals, cursors, or repeated text.
Persist a conversation only after at least one post snapshot has been written for the same Topic.
Engagement counts describe reach, not truth; keep claims, questions, corrections, moderation labels and uncertainty distinct.
